title: Keep all services running and healthy
description: Monitor gateway, proxy, and Ollama. Restart any that crash. Alert via Telegram if configured.

title: Maintain the Forge training pipeline
description: Mine training data from merged PRs and open-source repos. Ensure the collector, trainer, and evaluator run on schedule.

title: Improve local model benchmark score
description: Track benchmark scores after each training run. Deploy new models only if they improve on the previous version.
